name: codegraph
description: Local-first code intelligence. Indexes 21 languages with tree-sitter, exposes a knowledge graph to Claude over MCP.

codegraph.description: Tree-sitter-backed semantic code index. Tools: codegraph_search, codegraph_get_node, codegraph_callers, codegraph_callees, codegraph_impact, codegraph_status, codegraph_files, codegraph_resolve, codegraph_languages, codegraph_context.

requirements.note: Run the bootstrap once to install the codegraph binary and put it on PATH; this plugin then activates automatically in every Claude Code session.
